name: NADage nicotinamide riboside frailty registry
summary: Recruiting phase 2 registry testing nicotinamide riboside replenishment therapy against functional decline in aging and frailty, with no posted results.
population: Older adults with aging or frailty-related functional decline

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry lists estimated primary completion in Dec. 2027 and study completion in Dec. 2030; no posted results are expected yet.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is a direct aging/frailty NR trial-watch record.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
